tasks.label: Deploy Jellyfin plugin via SCP
args:
set -euo pipefail
dotnet build -c Release
PLUGIN_DIR="/var/lib/jellyfin/plugins/TranscodeDownload_1.0.0.0"
TMP_DIR="/tmp/TranscodeDownload_1.0.0.0"
ssh jellyfin "mkdir -p ${TMP_DIR}"
scp bin/Release/net9.0/Jellyfin.Plugin.TranscodeDownload.dll bin/Release/net9.0/meta.json jellyfin:${TMP_DIR}/
ssh -tt jellyfin "sudo mkdir -p ${PLUGIN_DIR} && sudo mv ${TMP_DIR}/Jellyfin.Plugin.TranscodeDownload.dll ${PLUGIN_DIR}/ && sudo mv ${TMP_DIR}/meta.json ${PLUGIN_DIR}/ && sudo chown -R jellyfin:jellyfin ${PLUGIN_DIR} && rm -rf ${TMP_DIR}"
echo Upload complete to jellyfin:${PLUGIN_DIR}

tasks.label: Deploy + Restart Jellyfin + Show Logs
args:
set -euo pipefail
dotnet build -c Release
PLUGIN_DIR="/var/lib/jellyfin/plugins/TranscodeDownload_1.0.0.0"
TMP_DIR="/tmp/TranscodeDownload_1.0.0.0"
ssh jellyfin "mkdir -p ${TMP_DIR}"
scp bin/Release/net9.0/Jellyfin.Plugin.TranscodeDownload.dll bin/Release/net9.0/meta.json jellyfin:${TMP_DIR}/
ssh -tt jellyfin "sudo mkdir -p ${PLUGIN_DIR} && sudo mv ${TMP_DIR}/Jellyfin.Plugin.TranscodeDownload.dll ${PLUGIN_DIR}/ && sudo mv ${TMP_DIR}/meta.json ${PLUGIN_DIR}/ && sudo chown -R jellyfin:jellyfin ${PLUGIN_DIR} && rm -rf ${TMP_DIR} && sudo systemctl restart jellyfin && sleep 2 && sudo journalctl -u jellyfin -n 120 --no-pager | grep -Ei -e TranscodeDownload -e plugin -e exception -e error || true"
echo Deploy/restart/log check complete.
